title: Tangy Japanese Canola Oil Bake
description: A dense, tangy Japanese dish featuring canola oil that's perfect for hangover relief and raw-friendly. This bake is quick to prepare and packed with flavor.

ingredients.name: canola oil
ingredients.notes: use cold-pressed for maximum tangy flavor

instructions: Soak kombu in cold water for 5 minutes to release natural umami.
Heat 2 tbsp canola oil in a small pan over medium heat until shimmering.
Add 1 tsp white miso paste and 1 tsp rice vinegar, whisking until smooth.
Add 10 fresh shiso leaves, cook for 1 minute until slightly wilted.
Remove from heat and drizzle with 1/2 inch soaked kombu.
Let sit for 1 minute to infuse flavors.
